title: Create: Delete and Repeat
description: A mod that adds a Create style way to get rid of unwanted stuff
body:
![The mod title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/206b69aa110f1a9843b5c8cc791e59627648c1ea.png)

**_Create: Delete and Repeat_** is an addon for _Create 6.0+_ that adds a convenient way to get rid of any item or liquid.

- **_Fluid Voider_**: a block that, when connected to a fluid tank and activated with a redstone signal, will start burning through the liquid in the tank, but be careful around it or _you might get burnt_

![Fluid Voider Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2bf0a6d381971a24f96a6e76bbc2d149f7440ca.png)
- **_Strainer_**: a block that, when placed _under a fluid tank_, drains and filters the fluid from it and produces some items
  
![Strainer Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e31fe4de937aa65da700bc2611747e3e2e3ed3a4.png)
- **_Industrial Cauldron_**: a cauldron that burns items fed into it if filled with lava and, just like the fluid voider, _be careful around it_
  
![Industrial Cauldrom Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f8ba573a6a277b434a091c94c45e0531030e729.png)

- **_Threshold Voider_**: a configurable block that only voids items when over a certain threshold. Has a filter that specifies what item is monitored and voided

![Threshold Voider crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79852f2f29c1bfe2633476b652c7741c3a6e5390.jpeg)
